title: Immunization and vaccine priorities in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Immunization and vaccine priorities in Canada
What federal, provincial and territorial partners are doing  to protect Canadians from falling sick from vaccine-preventable disease.
- National  Immunization Strategy How federal, provincial and territorial decision makers and  other stakeholders are improving vaccination programs.
- How federal, provincial and territorial decision makers and  other stakeholders are improving vaccination programs.
- Immunization  Partnership Fund Support for provinces, territories and other partners to  carry out projects to improve vaccination access and uptake.
- Support for provinces, territories and other partners to  carry out projects to improve vaccination access and uptake.
- Vaccine research and development priorities List of pathogens prioritized for vaccine research  and development, including themes, potential impacts and development status.
- List of pathogens prioritized for vaccine research  and development, including themes, potential impacts and development status.
